\tzpentry{ID4935}{Eigenvalue}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4935 introduces Eigenvalue as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} f(\lambda x) = \lambda^D f(x) \implies D \approx 3/2 \end{equation}
